headlines.title: Secret Service says it shot a man near the White House who allegedly fired toward officers
headlines.description: It wasn’t clear whether the incident had any connection to President Donald Trump or the White House.

headlines.title: Justices Jackson and Alito spar over Supreme Court decision to expedite Louisiana redistricting ruling
headlines.description: The decision led liberal Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to harshly criticize the court's conservative majority as Louisiana rushes to draw a new map for this year's election.

headlines.title: Inside the heated clash over DHS ‘master plan’ for deportations
headlines.description: Inside the heated clash over DHS ‘master plan’ for deportations

headlines.title: What to watch in Tuesday's elections: Trump seeks payback in Indiana
headlines.description: President Donald Trump's effort to defeat Republicans who have opposed key priorities turns Tuesday to Indiana's state Senate primaries, in which he and his allies are trying to unseat seven GOP state senators who voted last year against redrawing the state’s congressional map

headlines.title: Republicans fret over Iowa as tough midterm races develop
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance will visit Iowa Tuesday — a trip meant to help endangered Rep. Zach Nunn in a state where the GOP also faces issues in big races for the Senate and governor.

headlines.title: Suspect in shooting near White House loaded into ambulance
headlines.description: A man who allegedly fired a gun toward Secret Service officers near the White House was loaded into an ambulance after being shot.

headlines.title: Secret Service shoots one person near White House
headlines.description: The U.S. Secret Service said agents shot a man near the White House after the suspect appeared to have a firearm and allegedly opened fire when he was confronted by authorities.

headlines.title: Iran retains ‘residual capabilities’ in Strait of Hormuz as U.S. guides ships: retired vice admiral
headlines.description: Iran fires at U.S.-flagged vessels in the Strait of Hormuz despite ceasefire. NBC News correspondents Courtney Kube, Monica Alba and Richard Engel report on the fallout. Former Commander of U.S. Fifth Fleet retired Vice Admiral Kevin Donegan discusses the latest escalation and the U.S. operation to “guide” vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Putin, Zelenskyy proclaim rival ceasefires around Russia's Victory day commemorations
headlines.description: Russian ⁠President ​Vladimir Putin on Monday announced a two-day ⁠ceasefire in ‌the ‌war with Ukraine to observe the anniversary ⁠of the ‌defeat ⁠of Nazi Germany in World War ‌II

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?
